prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk".
Locate the bottom edge of Item 7's text on the page.
- If the "Item 7A" heading is visible on this page, then Item 7 ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise, Item 7 continues to the bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 7 immediately before it ends. These must be the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Secretary. Accordingly we determine our tax positions require judgments, the use of estimates in certain cases and the
interpretation and application of complex tax laws.
